# Revenue Replaces Risk When CX meets AI

AI-fueled fraud tools are the key to enabling next-level consumer experiences. Sift’s AI-powered platform transforms fraud prevention into a competitive advantage for you, your team, and your consumers.

## Deep Data. Uncompromising Control.

Do more with data than ever imagined. The Sift Platform utilizes a rich and tenured global data network with accessible and impactful decisioning tools.

Unprecedented user insights are combined with advanced automation capabilities along with access to a community of fraud experts that helps pinpoint new opportunities of growth at each step of the customer journey.

**Multiple solutions. One platform. Countless opportunities to grow fearlessly.**

## Benefits by the Numbers

1T+

Annual events

Do more with more data. Our global network of over 1 trillion data signals represents over 34k sites and apps feeding by-the-second risk insights to our AI-fueled models.

1.6B

Authentic digital footprints

Increase accuracy through identity-level insights. Our network has recognized over a billion unique digital personas to strengthen our scoring and build winning workflows.

$4.2M

In losses prevented annually\*

Combine identity-centric accuracy, real-time behavioral analysis, and device fingerprinting to detect fraud faster, close data gaps, and shorten response times.  
  
_\*Median per year, per customer._

## One Platform with rules and All

Recognized as a leader in digital fraud management by Forrester, Sift's patented approach combines critical components of modern fraud prevention into one holistic, AI-powered platform.  
  
**Building an internal risk engine?** The Sift Score API adds critical external context to internally-built risk models. Detect global & industry threats with real-time risk scores powered by 1T annual consortium events. Build the way you want, without sacrificing access to the powerful tools in the Sift Console. **[Learn more ->](https://sift.com/solutions/sift-score-api/)**

### Decisioning & Data at Our Core

Sift’s strength lies at the intersection of deep data, real-time risk scores, and identity graph insights to make up a comprehensive fraud intelligence network. Assessing interconnected risks across industries and continents continuously fuels and refines our Global Data Network as well as our AI/ML models.

[Explore Network Data](/fibr-fraud-industry-benchmarking-resource/)

![The-Sift-Platform-Offset-Circle](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20750%20674'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Revolutionary Rules & Actionable Insights

Rewrite the rulebook on fraud prevention. Sift’s revolutionary AI-led platform combines cutting-edge technology with actionable insights derived from extensive, real-time data analysis. By constantly adapting and evolving, Sift empowers businesses to stay one step ahead of fraudsters, safeguarding their assets, users, and reputation.

[See How Sift Works](/resources/ebook/how-sift-works/)

### Case Management & Reporting

Efficiently manage and track fraud cases with Sift’s intuitive case management and reporting tools. Streamline workflows, collaborate seamlessly, and gain valuable insights into your fraud prevention efforts. With customizable reporting features, stay informed and in control, ensuring swift resolution and minimal impact on your business.

[Investigate Solutions](/solutions/)

### Outcomes You Care About

Our commitment is to our customers, and we deliver the outcomes that matter most to you. Whether it’s reducing chargebacks, increasing revenue, or enhancing customer trust, our solutions are designed to drive tangible results. With our proactive approach to fraud prevention, you can focus on what you do best while we take care of protecting your business interests.

### Fine Tune Your Tech Stack

More revenue and stronger results happen when solutions speak the same language. Our hand-picked orchestration partners are specially selected to align with exactly what you need, and nothing that you don’t.

### Coverage Across Connections

Where money moves, we’ve got you covered. Secure every corner of the currency journey from point of sale to transfer, protect PII, and confidently accept alternative payments at scale.

[Learn more](/partner-ecosystem/payment-service-providers)

### A Single Source of Trust

Capturing the context of consumer behavior matters. Connect deeper dots and close data gaps with AI-surfaced signals that paint a complete picture of risk, all while surfacing new avenues for growth.

[Learn more](/partner-ecosystem/identity-verification-proofing)

![image-2](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20632%20450'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Accelerated Accuracy and Acceptance

Reserve friction for fraudsters through AI-sharpened data accuracy that instantly adapts as risk signals change. Fraud-focused partnerships ensure rusted users sail through transactions, acceptance rates soar, and false positives stay flat.

[Learn more](/partner-ecosystem/risk-based-authentication)

Every interaction is an opportunity to win. Own the risk-revenue equation through partnerships that provide efficient solutions to elevate support and service operations, no matter the scale.

[Learn more](/partner-ecosystem/customer-experience-management-cxm)
